results.rendered_html:
udvela a. [utkrāṃto velāṃ]
1 Overflowing its banks (as a river); bhayamapralayodvelādācakhyurnairṛtodadheḥ  R. 10. 34 ;  K. 333. 
2 Transgressing the proper limits.
3 Excessive;  K. 138.
